reviews.comment: Fantastic people to work with.  Great communication, excellent work and fair prices. Will definitely be back!

reviews.comment: Used FWT to tint our 2021 Revel/ 2020 Sprinter...They were great to work with (efficiently communicated via text message). Price was good for the XXL windshield. They were perfect on timing and the tint was flawless. Results turned perfectly.....just make sure you give the windshield two days to dry. Will certainly use FWT again!!

reviews.comment: My husband and I made an appointment to get our Journeys front windows tinted along with a sun strip. To say I was pleased with this establishment would be an understatement! The owners were very down to earth. We sat and chatted with the wife the whole time we were waiting. Their prices couldn't be better & it turned out wonderful! We are very pleased with the outcome! This is a great family run business with wonderful people! It was such a pleasure taking our business there! Will be back for future tinting needs!!

reviewReply.comment: We're so glad you guys are happy! Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review!

reviews.comment: Very happy with the tint that FWT did on my truck. Great quality in product and craftsmanship. I've had two vehicles done here, would recommend to anyone if looking for an amazing tint job.

reviews.comment: My husband and I took my 2020 Camry in on Sunday. We loved that during a time where many tint shops are closed, that they offered appointment only services Sunday. They were super friendly, knowledgeable and professional. They answered all of our questions and concerns and helped us elect the best tint for our needs. They finished the job right on time and we could not be happier with the tint job! My husband will be going back to get his 4Runner windows done soon! We highly recommend this place! You will not be disappointed!!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for this wonderful review!

TeamBurns Family

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTeWVESUlBEAE

reviews.comment:
An amazing family and team that produce both amazing customer services and amazing finishing products. I just received my Mazda 6 from Frederick Window Tinting and I have to say that if anyone else is looking for their car to look great in tints, this is the place to go.
From the beginning, Sharyn have provided myself with great customer services from the first time I called up to request an appointment for removal and reinstall. She made sure that I received my car as soon as possible and that’s what I call the best services so far.
Her husband and his team made my car look incredible compared to the recent tints I had on there. Thank you for everything!

5 ⭐️’s.
